patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -5,15 +5,19 @@
 #include <stdint.h>
 
 typedef enum {
-    POWER_MODE_RUN   = 0,
-    POWER_MODE_SLEEP = 1,
-    POWER_MODE_STOP  = 2,
-    POWER_MODE_STANDBY = 3
+    POWER_MODE_RUN     = 0,
+    POWER_MODE_SLEEP   = 1,
+    /* POWER_MODE_STOP removed — use POWER_MODE_DEEP_SLEEP instead */
+    POWER_MODE_DEEP_SLEEP = 2,  /* VALUE COLLISION with old STOP */
+    POWER_MODE_STANDBY = 3,
+    POWER_MODE_HIBERNATE = 4    /* NEW mode added */
 } power_mode_t;
 
-#define PMU_WAKEUP_RTC    (1U << 0)
-#define PMU_WAKEUP_GPIO   (1U << 1)
+/* Wakeup source bits REORDERED — old code using raw values breaks */
+#define PMU_WAKEUP_GPIO   (1U << 0)  /* was bit 1 */
+#define PMU_WAKEUP_RTC    (1U << 1)  /* was bit 0 */
 #define PMU_WAKEUP_UART   (1U << 2)
+#define PMU_WAKEUP_USB    (1U << 3)  /* NEW */
 
 void pmu_set_mode(power_mode_t mode);
 void pmu_enable_wakeup(uint32_t source_mask);
